◎简　　介  

　　Thuppakki is basically about Jagdish (Vijay), an army captain, who returns to Mumbai for a 40 days’ vacation. He has a loving family, comprising two sisters and his parents, who wish to get him married to an appropriate girl. After some cat and mouse episodes with Nisha (Kajal), the arranged bride, Jagdish’s personal life is set with her.On the other hand, he has a greater tas...
